userStories.title: `empty_wan_latent_video` wrapper

userStories.title: Pipeline sub-package wiring
userStories.description: As a Python developer, I want the `wan` sub-package properly wired into the `pipelines.video` namespace so that I can discover and import WAN pipelines consistently with the LTX family.

userStories.title: Example scripts
userStories.description: As a Python developer, I want CLI example scripts for each new pipeline so that I can test end-to-end inference from the command line with minimal boilerplate.
